title: Fix PDF highlights, line tool, and bookmark menu order (dbg106/107)
description:
Some highlights were invisible but still deletable; new lines sometimes did not appear until a second draw. Root causes: overlay matched lines by pageId only (stale ids after workspace sync), highlight coords were not zoom-safe after viewport changes, and line-tool preview/commit did not reliably refresh continuous-viewer SVG overlays.

dbg106 adds storageKey matching, normalized zoom-safe overlay coords, pointer capture for line preview, and overlay refresh on zoom/commit.

dbg107 pins the Bookmarks section to the top of the PDF right-click menu (above dynamic tool order) when the current PDF set has saved bookmarks.

Who is affected: OVH private server PDF Viewer fullscreen.
changeLog: Match highlight overlays by storageKey as well as pageId.
Store and render zoom-safe normalized highlight coordinates.
Refresh continuous-viewer SVG overlays after line commit and wheel zoom.
Line tool pointer capture + window pointermove for reliable preview.
Pin Bookmarks section above dynamic tool order when PDF set has saved bookmarks.
